Notes: * Stockton leads all-time series, 42-13. NJCU snaps 21-game losing streak vs.
Stockton and wins for first time in series since November 28, 1998 in
Jersey City. Last NJCU win at Stockton was 11/27/1996. NJCU's 6th win ever
Game.Officials: Paul Barksdale,  Derick Loury,  Daniel Martin
